name_cn:
Small with leather trim
DIOR book tote 24 Early Spring New Arrival
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play
Here comes a tote bag you can actually carry! Simply amazing
A viral hit derived from the most classic tote
More and more people love carrying large bags, truly gender-neutral
Whether by hand or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are no problem
Structured and doesn't collapse, you'll want to carry it every day
Big bag lovers can buy with confidence!!
26×12×21cm
Model 8835
